endpoints.name:
Get Trades Executed report for the accounts of a specified client.
            
This report is available in the following formats:


*   PDF
*   Excel

To request a specific format, please set the 'Accept' header on your request to one of the following:


*   For PDF : application/pdf
*   For Excel : application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet

parameters.name: FromDate
parameters.description: Include TradesExecuted from this date. By default returns the previous date report.

parameters.name: ToDate
parameters.description: Include TradesExecuted till this date. By default returns the previous date report.
